## Summary

<!-- One or two bullets: what changed and why. Keep it terse, no test-plan checklist, no metrics. -->

<!--
release-please reads the PR title (or squashed commit) to version the next release:
`feat` cuts a minor, `fix` and `perf` cut a patch, and a `!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer cuts a major.
Other types land in the changelog without bumping the version.
Full type-to-section mapping: release-please-config.json.
Override the computed version with a `Release-As: <version>` footer when needed.
-->
